name: mvw-cashier-app
description: Browser-based cashier app for club events
author: Tiliavir

scripts.build:assets: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.compile: npm run build:assets && npm run build:hugo
scripts.validate: npx vnu --skip-non-html public/index.html public/create/index.html public/edit/index.html public/settings/index.html public/stats/index.html public/impressum/index.html public/haftungsausschluss/index.html
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run lint && npm run validate && npm run test
